title: podocarpaceae
intro: The Podocarpaceae rank is a family of coniferous plants. It is a diverse group of evergreen trees and shrubs that are primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere, including species such as the yew pine and the redwood. Many species within the Podocarpaceae family are notable for their unique needle-like leaves and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. This family is also characterized by the production of cones that release seeds, contributing to the reproduction and dispersal of its species.
